raw_cv_text:
Moinecha Ramos-Horta
+44 20 7946 0958 | Email: moinecha.ramos@outlook.com | LinkedIn: moinecha-ramos-horta | GitHub: MoinechaRamos-Horta |
https://github.com/moinecharamos/portfolio
EDUCATION
University of Waterloo | Bachelor of Computer Science, Honours Co-op 2018 - 2022
Achieved Dean's List distinction for 3 consecutive years with GPA 3.8/4.0 in core computer science courses
Led open-source contributions with 50+ pull requests to Apache Kafka, focusing on performance optimization
Georgia Institute of Technology | Master of Science in Computer Science (Specialization: Distributed 2022 - 2023
Systems)
Graduated with distinction; thesis on distributed cache invalidation strategies published at ACM symposium with 1,200+
citations
Completed 3 graduate research assistantships building scalable microservices handling 50K+ requests/sec
EXPERIENCE
Stripe | Backend Engineer II Jan 2024 - Present
Architected payment reconciliation microservice processing 2.5M+ daily transactions, reducing payment settlement
latency by 35% and saving $1.2M annually in fraud losses
Optimized database query performance for transaction ledger service, decreasing p99 query response time from 850ms to
120ms and improving throughput by 280%
Led migration of legacy payment gateway from monolith to event-driven architecture using Kafka, enabling 40+ new
payment methods with zero downtime
Datadog | Senior Software Engineer, Infrastructure Aug 2022 - Dec 2023
Designed and deployed distributed log aggregation pipeline processing 500B+ events daily, handling 45% higher volume
than previous system with only 12% additional resources
Implemented automatic index retention policies reducing storage costs by $800K/year while maintaining 99.95% query
SLA
Mentored 5 junior engineers and reviewed 200+ pull requests, establishing coding standards that reduced production
incidents by 28%
Notion | Backend Engineer Jun 2021 - Jul 2022
Built real-time collaborative editing backend serving 2.5K+ concurrent users per instance with <50ms latency, utilizing
WebSocket connection pooling and Redis pub/sub
Engineered block versioning system reducing database storage footprint by 66% through incremental delta compression,
allowing 10x larger workspace support
Contributed 12 production features across payments, workspace management, and API teams; code approved with 0 post-
deployment rollbacks
PROJECTS
QueryVault | Go, PostgreSQL, Redis, gRPC, Docker Mar 2023 - Sep 2023
Engineered distributed query caching proxy supporting 50K+ concurrent connections with automatic cache invalidation,
reducing downstream database load by 72%
Implemented intelligent query routing and connection pooling that improved application query latency by 240% under
high concurrency
ChronoStream | Rust, Apache Kafka, Prometheus, Kubernetes Oct 2022 - Feb 2023
Developed time-series event streaming framework processing 1M+ events/sec with exactly-once semantics, achieving
99.99% uptime in production deployment
Reduced memory footprint by 45% through ring buffer optimization and achieved 3x faster throughput compared to
existing solutions
AuthFlow | Node.js, TypeScript, PostgreSQL, OAuth 2.0 Nov 2021 - Mar 2022
Built OAuth 2.0 and SAML authentication service supporting 20+ identity providers, securing access for 100K+ users
across 150+ organizations
Implemented token rotation and session management reducing unauthorized access incidents by 95%
MetricsCollector | Python, InfluxDB, Grafana, AWS Lambda Jan 2021 - Jun 2021
Created serverless metrics aggregation platform collecting 500M+ data points daily with 0.8s average latency, scaling
from 10 to 500+ monitoring endpoints
Optimized ingestion pipeline reducing costs by 52% through batching and compression techniques
EXTRACURRICULAR
Systems Design & Distributed Computing Community | Co-Organizer & Mentor 2023 - Present
Mentored 15+ junior backend engineers through monthly architecture deep-dive sessions covering consensus algorithms,
sharding patterns, and failure recovery
Organized quarterly distributed systems hackathons attracting 200+ participants with live judging of microservices
designs
Cloudflare Workers Open Source Initiative | Active Contributor & Technical Speaker 2022 - Present
Contributed 8 production-grade edge computing examples with 2,500+ GitHub stars, focused on real-time data processing
at network edge
Delivered talk on 'Serverless Backend Patterns' at London Backend Developers Conference 2024 to 350+ attendees
TECHNICAL SKILLS
Languages – Go, Python, TypeScript/JavaScript, Rust, SQL, Java
Technologies – Apache Kafka, PostgreSQL, Redis, MongoDB, gRPC, REST APIs, WebSockets, Microservices Architecture,
Docker, Kubernetes, Event-Driven Systems, Distributed Systems, GraphQL
Tools – Git, GitHub, AWS (EC2, S3, Lambda, RDS), Google Cloud Platform, Prometheus, Grafana, DataDog, ElasticSearch,
CI/CD (GitHub Actions, Jenkins), Linux, Postman
